posts.author: Nicolas.G (Nicolas Goyon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Being able to “extract” a view on its own line in the workspace, as if it were another project, but it would be a project’s view.

Usecase :
Being able to split views for multiple purposes :

  • General project view (couple charts for the project managers)
  • Detailed day-to-day view for the project members
  • etc…
